allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add card input textarea label badge -y)
Bash(npx shadcn@latest add table dialog tabs -y)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(x['name']\) for x in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k in ['name','download_url','encoding','size']}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x['path']\) for x in d.get\('items',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x['path']\) for x in d.get\('tree',[]\) if 'graph' in x['path'].lower\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('message','no message'\)\); print\('truncated:', d.get\('truncated','?'\)\); print\('tree count:', len\(d.get\('tree',[]\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('default_branch:', d.get\('default_branch','?'\)\); print\('description:', d.get\('description','?'\)\)")
